'''wabada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foederatus|foederatus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foederatus|foederatus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wabada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæbædæth|wæbædæth]] || [[word:wæbædæj|wæbædæj]] || [[word:wæbædæsh|wæbædæsh]] || [[word:wæbædæ|wæbædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wababadath|wababadath]] || [[word:wababadaj|wababadaj]] || [[word:wababadash|wababadash]] || [[word:wababada|wababada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wabadath|wabadath]] || [[word:wabadaj|wabadaj]] || [[word:wabadash|wabadash]] || [[word:wabada|wabada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wabafdath|wabafdath]] || [[word:wabafdaj|wabafdaj]] || [[word:wabafdash|wabafdash]] || [[word:wabafdaf|wabafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wabadatha|wabadatha]] || [[word:wabadaja|wabadaja]] || [[word:wabadasha|wabadasha]] || [[word:wabadaka|wabadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wabadath|wabadath]] || [[word:wabadaj|wabadaj]] || [[word:wabadash|wabadash]] || [[word:wabada|wabada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wabadathal|wabadathal]] || [[word:wabadajal|wabadajal]] || [[word:wabadashal|wabadashal]] || [[word:wabadakal|wabadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wabadathatha|wabadathatha]] || [[word:wabadajaja|wabadajaja]] || [[word:wabadashasha|wabadashasha]] || [[word:wabadaka|wabadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wabadathan|wabadathan]] || [[word:wabadajan|wabadajan]] || [[word:wabadashan|wabadashan]] || [[word:wabadakan|wabadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wabadathaoro|wabadathaoro]] || [[word:wabadajaoro|wabadajaoro]] || [[word:wabadashaoro|wabadashaoro]] || [[word:wabadakaoro|wabadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
